zh.Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Ger: 德國海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦盧貝可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose於1330年出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格可盧門迪可時，他的父親Johan Krummedige36歲，母親Ann Pedersdatter Rytze50歲。他於大約1349年與Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦福倫斯包格斯坦可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1393年在丹麥費奧比勒吉斯莫斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose于1330年出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格可盧門迪可时，他的父亲Johan Krummedige36岁，母亲Ann Pedersdatter Rytze50岁。他于大约1349年与Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦福倫斯包格斯坦可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1393年在丹麦費奧比勒吉斯莫斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: til
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Haitian: ornamental or topographic name, based on the Haitian Creole spelling of French ville (compare St. Vil ).

French and possibly also Haitian: shortened form of Ville, a habitational name from (La) Ville, the name of several places in various parts of France named with ville ‘settlement’. This surname is rare in France. It was brought to the US mainly from Haiti (see also 1 above).

variants.name: St. Vil
meanings: ornamental name composed of two common French (and Haitian Creole) surname elements, saint ‘holy’ and vil ‘settlement’ (see Vil ); compare Vilsaint .

alternatively, perhaps a shortened form of French Saintville, a habitational name from Sainville (Eure-et-Loir), or an altered form of French Sainthuile, itself a respelled habitational name from Sainte-Olle (Nord). Compare also Saintvil and Sainvil .

nameMeanings.name: og
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Johansen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Per, Niels, Nils, Thor, Johan, Bjorn, Lars, Oluf, Borge, Holger, Jarl.
Norwegian, Danish, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Johan (Scandinavian), Johann (German), vernacular forms of Johannes (see John ). Compare Johanson and Johnson .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose was born in 1330, in Krummendiek, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, his father, Johan Krummedige, was 36 and his mother, Ann Pedersdatter Rytze, was 50. He married Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram about 1349, in Stangheck, Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1393, in Løgismose, Hårby, Fyn, Denmark, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose est né en 1330, à Krummendiek, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Johan Krummedige, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ann Pedersdatter Rytze, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram environ 1349, à Stangheck, Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1393, à Løgismose, Hårby, Fyn, Danemark, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose 1330 in Krummendiek, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johan Krummedige 36 und seine Mutter Ann Pedersdatter Rytze 50. Er hat um 1349 in Stangheck, Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1393 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Løgismose, Hårby, Fyn, Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose è nato il nel 1330 nel Krummendiek, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, il suo padre, Johan Krummedige, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Ann Pedersdatter Rytze, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram circa 1349, nel Stangheck, Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1393, nel Løgismose, Hårby, Fyn, Danimarca, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismoseが1330年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス ステインブルグクルンメンディエクで生まれた時，父Johan Krummedigeは36歳，母Ann Pedersdatter Rytzeは50歳であった。約1349年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインフレンスブルグスタングヘックでSidsel Pedersdatter Skramと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1393年にデンマークフインhaルビールoジスモゼで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose(이)가 1330년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 스타인버그 크럼멘디크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johan Krummedige(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Pedersdatter Rytze(은)는 50세였다. 그는 대략 1349년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 플렌스버그 스탠게이c크에서 Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 덴마크 피 ha르비 o지스모스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose nasceu em 1330, em Krummendiek, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Johan Krummedige, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ann Pedersdatter Rytze, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram aproximadamente 1349, em Stangheck, Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1393, em Løgismose, Hårby, Fyn, Dinamarca, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose родился в 1330 г. в местности круммендиек, крис стинбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, его отцу по имени Johan Krummedige было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Pedersdatter Rytze, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram около 1349 г. в местности стангхекк, фленсбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1393 г. в местности лoгисмос, хaрби, фин, Дания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Segebod Johansen Krummedige til Mehlbeck og Løgismose nació en 1330, en Krummendiek, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, su papá, Johan Krummedige, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ann Pedersdatter Rytze, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Sidsel Pedersdatter Skram aproximadamente 1349, en Stangheck, Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1393, en Løgismose, Hårby, Fyn, Dinamarca, a la edad de 63 años.
